Given my experiences and values, I believe that a balanced approach is ideal. I would likely start by addressing the issue privately with the coworker first, seeking to resolve it amicably without escalating the situation. If that fails, I would consider bringing it up with a supervisor or HR to ensure a fair resolution. This approach allows me to uphold my principles while minimizing conflict, placing the marker around 70 on the spectrum.
